mapper.select: select distinct p.project_id, p.project_name, p.owner_id, p.created_at from project p where p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} ) order by p.created_at desc, p.project_name

select p.project_id, p.project_name, p.owner_id from project p where p.project_id = #{projectId} and ( p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} ) )

select p.project_id, p.project_name, p.owner_id, case when p.owner_id = #{userId} then 'Y' when exists ( select 1 from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id join role_permission rp on pm.role_id = rp.role_id join permission perm on rp.permission_id = perm.permission_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} and perm.permission_code = #{permissionCode} ) then 'Y' else 'N' end as permission_yn from project p where p.project_id = #{projectId} and ( p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} ) )

select p.project_id, p.project_name, p.owner_id, case when p.owner_id = #{userId} then 'Y' when exists ( select 1 from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id join role_permission rp on pm.role_id = rp.role_id join permission perm on rp.permission_id = perm.permission_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} and perm.permission_code = #{issueCreatePermissionCode} ) then 'Y' else 'N' end as issue_create_permission_yn, case when p.owner_id = #{userId} then 'Y' when exists ( select 1 from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id join role_permission rp on pm.role_id = rp.role_id join permission perm on rp.permission_id = perm.permission_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} and perm.permission_code = #{milestoneCreatePermissionCode} ) then 'Y' else 'N' end as milestone_create_permission_yn from project p where p.project_id = #{projectId} and ( p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} ) )
select project_id from project where project_id = #{projectId} for update
select nvl(max(issue_no), 0) + 1 from issue where project_id = #{projectId}
select ( select nvl(max(i.issue_no), 0) + 1 from issue i where i.project_id = p.project_id ) as issue_no from project p where p.project_id = #{projectId} for update

select ist.issue_status_id, ist.status_name as issue_status_name, ist.closed_yn from issue_status ist join project p on ist.user_id = p.owner_id where p.project_id = #{projectId} order by ist.issue_status_id asc

select i.issue_id, i.issue_no, '#' || lpad(to_char(i.issue_no), 4, '0') as display_issue_no, i.project_id, p.project_name, p.owner_id, i.milestone_id, m.title as milestone_title, i.version_id, v.version_name, v.status_code as version_status_code, i.issue_type_id, it.issue_type_name, i.issue_status_id, ist.status_name as issue_status_name, ist.closed_yn, i.setting_code_id, sc.setting_name, i.assignee_id, assignee.user_name as assignee_name, i.author_id, author.user_name as author_name, i.title, i.description, i.start_date, i.due_date, i.estimated_hours, i.progress_rate, i.created_at, i.updated_at, i.parent_issue_id, parent_issue.title as parent_issue_title, case when p.owner_id = #{userId} then 'Y' when exists ( select 1 from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id join role_permission rp on pm.role_id = rp.role_id join permission perm on rp.permission_id = perm.permission_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} and perm.permission_code = #{updatePermissionCode} ) then 'Y' else 'N' end as issue_update_permission_yn, case when p.owner_id = #{userId} then 'Y' when exists ( select 1 from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id join role_permission rp on pm.role_id = rp.role_id join permission perm on rp.permission_id = perm.permission_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} and perm.permission_code = #{deletePermissionCode} ) then 'Y' else 'N' end as issue_delete_permission_yn from issue i join project p on i.project_id = p.project_id left join issue_type it on i.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id left join issue_status ist on i.issue_status_id = ist.issue_status_id left join setting_code sc on i.setting_code_id = sc.setting_code_id left join users assignee on i.assignee_id = assignee.user_id left join users author on i.author_id = author.user_id left join project_version v on i.version_id = v.version_id and i.project_id = v.project_id left join milestone m on i.milestone_id = m.milestone_id and i.project_id = m.project_id left join issue parent_issue on i.parent_issue_id = parent_issue.issue_id and i.project_id = parent_issue.project_id where i.project_id = #{projectId} and i.issue_id = #{issueId} and ( p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} ) )

select count(*) from issue i join project p on i.project_id = p.project_id where i.project_id = #{projectId} and i.issue_id = #{issueId} and ( p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} ) )

select * from ( select 'FIELD_SETTING' as option_group, current_issue.issue_type_id, fs.field_setting_id, case fs.field_code when 'i001' then 'ASSIGNEE' when 'i002' then 'MILESTONE' when 'i003' then 'PARENT_ISSUE' when 'i004' then 'START_DATE' when 'i005' then 'DUE_DATE' when 'i006' then 'ESTIMATED_HOURS' else fs.field_code end as field_code, fs.use_yn, fs.required_yn, null as issue_status_id, null as issue_status_name, null as closed_yn, null as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, null as version_id, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, null as parent_issue_id, null as parent_issue_title, null as history_id, null as issue_id, null as changed_by, null as changed_by_name, null as change_type_code, null as change_type_name, null as reason, null as before_value, null as after_value, null as changed_at, 1 as option_sort, row_number() over ( order by case fs.field_code when 'i001' then 1 when 'i002' then 2 when 'i003' then 3 when 'i004' then 4 when 'i005' then 5 when 'i006' then 6 else 99 end ) as row_sort from issue current_issue join issue_type_field_setting fs on current_issue.issue_type_id = fs.issue_type_id where current_issue.project_id = #{projectId} and current_issue.issue_id = #{issueId}
union all
select 'AVAILABLE_STATUS' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as field_setting_id, null as field_code, null as use_yn, null as required_yn, ist.issue_status_id, ist.status_name as issue_status_name, ist.closed_yn, null as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, null as version_id, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, null as parent_issue_id, null as parent_issue_title, null as history_id, null as issue_id, null as changed_by, null as changed_by_name, null as change_type_code, null as change_type_name, null as reason, null as before_value, null as after_value, null as changed_at, 2 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by ist.issue_status_id asc) as row_sort from issue i join project p on i.project_id = p.project_id join issue_status ist on ist.user_id = p.owner_id where i.project_id = #{projectId} and i.issue_id = #{issueId} and ( ist.issue_status_id = i.issue_status_id or p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from workflow_transition wt join project_member pm on wt.role_id = pm.role_id join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id where pm.project_id = i.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} and wt.issue_type_id = i.issue_type_id and wt.from_status_id = i.issue_status_id and wt.to_status_id = ist.issue_status_id and ( wt.apply_target_code = 'j001' or (wt.apply_target_code = 'j002' and i.author_id = #{userId}) or (wt.apply_target_code = 'j003' and i.assignee_id = #{userId}) ) ) )
union all
select 'PRIORITY' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as field_setting_id, null as field_code, null as use_yn, null as required_yn, null as issue_status_id, null as issue_status_name, null as closed_yn, null as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, null as version_id, sc.setting_code_id, sc.setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, null as parent_issue_id, null as parent_issue_title, null as history_id, null as issue_id, null as changed_by, null as changed_by_name, null as change_type_code, null as change_type_name, null as reason, null as before_value, null as after_value, null as changed_at, 3 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by sc.default_yn desc, sc.setting_code_id asc) as row_sort from setting_code sc join project p on sc.user_id = p.owner_id where p.project_id = #{projectId} and sc.setting_group_name = 'g002'
union all
select 'ASSIGNEE' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as field_setting_id, null as field_code, null as use_yn, null as required_yn, null as issue_status_id, null as issue_status_name, null as closed_yn, null as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, null as version_id, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, x.assignee_id, x.assignee_name, null as parent_issue_id, null as parent_issue_title, null as history_id, null as issue_id, null as changed_by, null as changed_by_name, null as change_type_code, null as change_type_name, null as reason, null as before_value, null as after_value, null as changed_at, 4 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by x.assignee_name, x.assignee_id) as row_sort from ( select u.user_id as assignee_id, u.user_name as assignee_name from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id join users u on tm.user_id = u.user_id where pm.project_id = #{projectId}
union
select owner_user.user_id as assignee_id, owner_user.user_name as assignee_name from project p join users owner_user on p.owner_id = owner_user.user_id where p.project_id = #{projectId} ) x
union all
select 'MILESTONE' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as field_setting_id, null as field_code, null as use_yn, null as required_yn, null as issue_status_id, null as issue_status_name, null as closed_yn, m.milestone_id, m.title as milestone_title, m.version_id, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, null as parent_issue_id, null as parent_issue_title, null as history_id, null as issue_id, null as changed_by, null as changed_by_name, null as change_type_code, null as change_type_name, null as reason, null as before_value, null as after_value, null as changed_at, 5 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by m.start_date asc nulls last, m.milestone_id asc) as row_sort from milestone m join project_version v on m.version_id = v.version_id and m.project_id = v.project_id left join issue current_issue on current_issue.issue_id = #{issueId} and current_issue.project_id = m.project_id where m.project_id = #{projectId} and m.version_id = current_issue.version_id and ( v.status_code != 'k003' or current_issue.milestone_id = m.milestone_id )
union all
select 'PARENT_ISSUE' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as field_setting_id, null as field_code, null as use_yn, null as required_yn, null as issue_status_id, null as issue_status_name, null as closed_yn, null as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, null as version_id, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, parent.issue_id as parent_issue_id, parent.title as parent_issue_title, null as history_id, null as issue_id, null as changed_by, null as changed_by_name, null as change_type_code, null as change_type_name, null as reason, null as before_value, null as after_value, null as changed_at, 6 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by parent.issue_no desc) as row_sort from issue parent where parent.project_id = #{projectId} and parent.issue_id != #{issueId}
union all
select 'HISTORY' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as field_setting_id, null as field_code, null as use_yn, null as required_yn, null as issue_status_id, null as issue_status_name, null as closed_yn, null as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, null as version_id, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, null as parent_issue_id, null as parent_issue_title, ih.history_id, ih.issue_id, ih.changed_by, u.user_name as changed_by_name, ih.change_type_code, ih.change_type_name, ih.reason, ih.before_value, ih.after_value, ih.changed_at, 7 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by ih.changed_at desc, ih.history_id desc) as row_sort from issue_history ih left join users u on ih.changed_by = u.user_id where ih.issue_id = #{issueId} ) order by option_sort, row_sort

select distinct ist.issue_status_id, ist.status_name as issue_status_name, ist.closed_yn from issue i join project p on i.project_id = p.project_id join issue_status ist on ist.user_id = p.owner_id where i.project_id = #{projectId} and i.issue_id = #{issueId} and ( ist.issue_status_id = i.issue_status_id or p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from workflow_transition wt join project_member pm on wt.role_id = pm.role_id join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id where pm.project_id = i.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} and wt.issue_type_id = i.issue_type_id and wt.from_status_id = i.issue_status_id and wt.to_status_id = ist.issue_status_id and ( wt.apply_target_code = 'j001' or (wt.apply_target_code = 'j002' and i.author_id = #{userId}) or (wt.apply_target_code = 'j003' and i.assignee_id = #{userId}) ) ) ) order by ist.issue_status_id asc

select it.issue_type_id, it.issue_type_name, it.initial_status_id, ist.status_name as initial_status_name from issue_type_project itp join issue_type it on itp.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id join issue_status ist on it.initial_status_id = ist.issue_status_id where itp.project_id = #{projectId} order by it.created_at asc, it.issue_type_id asc

select it.issue_type_id, it.issue_type_name, it.initial_status_id, ist.status_name as initial_status_name from issue_type_project itp join issue_type it on itp.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id join issue_status ist on it.initial_status_id = ist.issue_status_id where itp.project_id = #{projectId} and it.issue_type_id = #{issueTypeId}

select itp.issue_type_id, fs.field_setting_id, case fs.field_code when 'i001' then 'ASSIGNEE' when 'i002' then 'MILESTONE' when 'i003' then 'PARENT_ISSUE' when 'i004' then 'START_DATE' when 'i005' then 'DUE_DATE' when 'i006' then 'ESTIMATED_HOURS' else fs.field_code end as field_code, fs.use_yn, fs.required_yn from issue_type_project itp join issue_type_field_setting fs on itp.issue_type_id = fs.issue_type_id where itp.project_id = #{projectId} order by itp.issue_type_id, case fs.field_code when 'i001' then 1 when 'i002' then 2 when 'i003' then 3 when 'i004' then 4 when 'i005' then 5 when 'i006' then 6 else 99 end

select fs.issue_type_id, fs.field_setting_id, case fs.field_code when 'i001' then 'ASSIGNEE' when 'i002' then 'MILESTONE' when 'i003' then 'PARENT_ISSUE' when 'i004' then 'START_DATE' when 'i005' then 'DUE_DATE' when 'i006' then 'ESTIMATED_HOURS' else fs.field_code end as field_code, fs.use_yn, fs.required_yn from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issueTypeId} order by case fs.field_code when 'i001' then 1 when 'i002' then 2 when 'i003' then 3 when 'i004' then 4 when 'i005' then 5 when 'i006' then 6 else 99 end

select version_id, version_name, status_code as version_status_code, default_yn from project_version where project_id = #{projectId} and status_code != 'k003' order by default_yn desc, created_at desc, version_id asc

select m.milestone_id, m.title as milestone_title, m.version_id from milestone m join project_version v on m.version_id = v.version_id and m.project_id = v.project_id where m.project_id = #{projectId} and v.status_code != 'k003' order by m.start_date asc, m.milestone_id asc

select sc.setting_code_id, sc.setting_name, sc.default_yn from setting_code sc join project p on sc.user_id = p.owner_id where p.project_id = #{projectId} and sc.setting_group_name = 'g002' order by sc.default_yn desc, sc.setting_code_id asc
select issue_id as parent_issue_id, title as parent_issue_title from issue where project_id = #{projectId} order by issue_no desc

select * from ( select 'ISSUE_TYPE' as option_group, it.issue_type_id, it.issue_type_name, it.initial_status_id, ist.status_name as initial_status_name, null as issue_status_id, null as issue_status_name, null as closed_yn, null as version_id, null as version_name, null as version_status_code, null as default_yn, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, 1 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by it.created_at asc, it.issue_type_id asc) as row_sort from issue_type_project itp join issue_type it on itp.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id join issue_status ist on it.initial_status_id = ist.issue_status_id where itp.project_id = #{projectId}
union all
select 'ISSUE_STATUS' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as issue_type_name, null as initial_status_id, null as initial_status_name, ist.issue_status_id, ist.status_name as issue_status_name, ist.closed_yn, null as version_id, null as version_name, null as version_status_code, null as default_yn, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, 2 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by ist.issue_status_id asc) as row_sort from issue_status ist join project p on ist.user_id = p.owner_id where p.project_id = #{projectId}
union all
select 'VERSION' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as issue_type_name, null as initial_status_id, null as initial_status_name, null as issue_status_id, null as issue_status_name, null as closed_yn, version_id, version_name, status_code as version_status_code, default_yn, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, 3 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by default_yn desc, created_at desc, version_id asc) as row_sort from project_version where project_id = #{projectId} and status_code != 'k003'
union all
select 'PRIORITY' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as issue_type_name, null as initial_status_id, null as initial_status_name, null as issue_status_id, null as issue_status_name, null as closed_yn, null as version_id, null as version_name, null as version_status_code, sc.default_yn, sc.setting_code_id, sc.setting_name, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, 4 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by sc.default_yn desc, sc.setting_code_id asc) as row_sort from setting_code sc join project p on sc.user_id = p.owner_id where p.project_id = #{projectId} and sc.setting_group_name = 'g002'
union all
select 'ASSIGNEE' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as issue_type_name, null as initial_status_id, null as initial_status_name, null as issue_status_id, null as issue_status_name, null as closed_yn, null as version_id, null as version_name, null as version_status_code, null as default_yn, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, x.assignee_id, x.assignee_name, 5 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by x.assignee_name, x.assignee_id) as row_sort from ( select u.user_id as assignee_id, u.user_name as assignee_name from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id join users u on tm.user_id = u.user_id where pm.project_id = #{projectId}
union
select owner_user.user_id as assignee_id, owner_user.user_name as assignee_name from project p join users owner_user on p.owner_id = owner_user.user_id where p.project_id = #{projectId} ) x ) order by option_sort, row_sort

select * from ( select 'ISSUE_TYPE' as option_group, it.issue_type_id, it.issue_type_name, it.initial_status_id, ist.status_name as initial_status_name, null as field_setting_id, null as field_code, null as use_yn, null as required_yn, null as version_id, null as version_name, null as version_status_code, null as default_yn, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, 1 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by it.created_at asc, it.issue_type_id asc) as row_sort from issue_type_project itp join issue_type it on itp.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id join issue_status ist on it.initial_status_id = ist.issue_status_id where itp.project_id = #{projectId}
union all
select 'FIELD_SETTING' as option_group, itp.issue_type_id, null as issue_type_name, null as initial_status_id, null as initial_status_name, fs.field_setting_id, case fs.field_code when 'i001' then 'ASSIGNEE' when 'i002' then 'MILESTONE' when 'i003' then 'PARENT_ISSUE' when 'i004' then 'START_DATE' when 'i005' then 'DUE_DATE' when 'i006' then 'ESTIMATED_HOURS' else fs.field_code end as field_code, fs.use_yn, fs.required_yn, null as version_id, null as version_name, null as version_status_code, null as default_yn, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, 2 as option_sort, row_number() over ( order by itp.issue_type_id, case fs.field_code when 'i001' then 1 when 'i002' then 2 when 'i003' then 3 when 'i004' then 4 when 'i005' then 5 when 'i006' then 6 else 99 end ) as row_sort from issue_type_project itp join issue_type_field_setting fs on itp.issue_type_id = fs.issue_type_id where itp.project_id = #{projectId}
union all
select 'VERSION' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as issue_type_name, null as initial_status_id, null as initial_status_name, null as field_setting_id, null as field_code, null as use_yn, null as required_yn, version_id, version_name, status_code as version_status_code, default_yn, null as setting_code_id, null as setting_name, 3 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by default_yn desc, created_at desc, version_id asc) as row_sort from project_version where project_id = #{projectId} and status_code != 'k003'
union all
select 'PRIORITY' as option_group, null as issue_type_id, null as issue_type_name, null as initial_status_id, null as initial_status_name, null as field_setting_id, null as field_code, null as use_yn, null as required_yn, null as version_id, null as version_name, null as version_status_code, sc.default_yn, sc.setting_code_id, sc.setting_name, 4 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by sc.default_yn desc, sc.setting_code_id asc) as row_sort from setting_code sc join project p on sc.user_id = p.owner_id where p.project_id = #{projectId} and sc.setting_group_name = 'g002' ) order by option_sort, row_sort

select * from ( select 'MILESTONE' as option_group, m.version_id, m.milestone_id, m.title as milestone_title, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, null as parent_issue_id, null as parent_issue_title, 1 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by m.start_date asc nulls last, m.milestone_id asc) as row_sort from milestone m join project_version v on m.version_id = v.version_id and m.project_id = v.project_id where m.project_id = #{projectId} and v.status_code != 'k003'
union all
select 'ASSIGNEE' as option_group, null as version_id, null as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, x.assignee_id, x.assignee_name, null as parent_issue_id, null as parent_issue_title, 2 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by x.assignee_name, x.assignee_id) as row_sort from ( select u.user_id as assignee_id, u.user_name as assignee_name from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id join users u on tm.user_id = u.user_id where pm.project_id = #{projectId}
union
select owner_user.user_id as assignee_id, owner_user.user_name as assignee_name from project p join users owner_user on p.owner_id = owner_user.user_id where p.project_id = #{projectId} ) x
union all
select 'PARENT_ISSUE' as option_group, null as version_id, null as milestone_id, null as milestone_title, null as assignee_id, null as assignee_name, issue_id as parent_issue_id, title as parent_issue_title, 3 as option_sort, row_number() over (order by issue_no desc) as row_sort from issue where project_id = #{projectId} ) order by option_sort, row_sort

select p.project_id, p.project_name, p.owner_id, case when p.owner_id = #{userId} then 'Y' when exists ( select 1 from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id join role_permission rp on pm.role_id = rp.role_id join permission perm on rp.permission_id = perm.permission_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} and perm.permission_code = #{permissionCode} ) then 'Y' else 'N' end as permission_yn, ( select max(it.initial_status_id) from issue_type_project itp join issue_type it on itp.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id where itp.project_id = p.project_id and it.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} ) as initial_status_id, ( select count(*) from project_version pv where pv.project_id = p.project_id and pv.version_id = #{issue.versionId} and pv.status_code != 'k003' ) as version_count, ( select count(*) from setting_code sc where sc.user_id = p.owner_id and sc.setting_group_name = 'g002' and sc.setting_code_id = #{issue.settingCodeId} ) as priority_count, nvl(( select max(fs.use_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} and fs.field_code in ('i001', 'ASSIGNEE') ), 'N') as assignee_use_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.required_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} and fs.field_code in ('i001', 'ASSIGNEE') ), 'N') as assignee_required_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.use_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} and fs.field_code in ('i002', 'MILESTONE') ), 'N') as milestone_use_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.required_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} and fs.field_code in ('i002', 'MILESTONE') ), 'N') as milestone_required_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.use_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} and fs.field_code in ('i003', 'PARENT_ISSUE') ), 'N') as parent_issue_use_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.required_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} and fs.field_code in ('i003', 'PARENT_ISSUE') ), 'N') as parent_issue_required_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.use_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} and fs.field_code in ('i004', 'START_DATE') ), 'N') as start_date_use_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.required_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} and fs.field_code in ('i004', 'START_DATE') ), 'N') as start_date_required_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.use_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} and fs.field_code in ('i005', 'DUE_DATE') ), 'N') as due_date_use_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.required_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} and fs.field_code in ('i005', 'DUE_DATE') ), 'N') as due_date_required_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.use_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} and fs.field_code in ('i006', 'ESTIMATED_HOURS') ), 'N') as estimated_hours_use_yn, nvl(( select max(fs.required_yn) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = #{issue.issueTypeId} and fs.field_code in ('i006', 'ESTIMATED_HOURS') ), 'N') as estimated_hours_required_yn, ( select count(*) from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{issue.assigneeId} ) + case when p.owner_id = #{issue.assigneeId} then 1 else 0 end as assignee_count, ( select count(*) from milestone m join project_version v on m.version_id = v.version_id and m.project_id = v.project_id where m.project_id = p.project_id and m.version_id = #{issue.versionId} and m.milestone_id = #{issue.milestoneId} and v.status_code != 'k003' ) as milestone_count, ( select count(*) from issue parent_issue where parent_issue.project_id = p.project_id and parent_issue.issue_id = #{issue.parentIssueId} ) as parent_issue_count from project p where p.project_id = #{issue.projectId} and ( p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} ) )
select count(*) from setting_code sc join project p on sc.user_id = p.owner_id where p.project_id = #{projectId} and sc.setting_group_name = 'g002' and sc.setting_code_id = #{settingCodeId}

select count(*) from milestone m join project_version v on m.version_id = v.version_id and m.project_id = v.project_id where m.project_id = #{projectId} and m.version_id = #{versionId} and m.milestone_id = #{milestoneId} and v.status_code != 'k003'

select count(*) from project p where p.project_id = #{projectId} and ( p.owner_id = #{assigneeId} or exists ( select 1 from project_member pm join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id where pm.project_id = p.project_id and tm.user_id = #{assigneeId} ) )
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'ISSUE_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMM') || '_' || TO_CHAR(SEQ_ISSUE_ID.NEXTVAL, 'FM0000') FROM DUAL
insert into issue ( issue_id, issue_no, project_id, milestone_id, version_id, issue_type_id, issue_status_id, setting_code_id, assignee_id, author_id, title, description, start_date, due_date, estimated_hours, progress_rate, created_at, updated_at, parent_issue_id ) values ( #{issueId}, #{issueNo}, #{projectId}, #{milestoneId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{versionId}, #{issueTypeId}, #{issueStatusId}, #{settingCodeId}, #{assigneeId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorId}, #{title}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nvl(#{startDate, jdbcType=DATE}, sysdate), #{dueDate, jdbcType=DATE}, nvl(#{estimatedHours, jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0), nvl(#{progressRate, jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0), sysdate, null, #{parentIssueId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: select i.issue_id, i.issue_no, '#' || lpad(to_char(i.issue_no), 4, '0') as display_issue_no, i.project_id, i.milestone_id, i.version_id, i.issue_type_id, i.issue_status_id, ist.status_name as issue_status_name, i.setting_code_id, sc.setting_name, i.assignee_id, i.author_id, i.title, i.description, i.start_date, i.due_date, i.estimated_hours, i.progress_rate, i.created_at, i.updated_at, i.parent_issue_id from issue i left join issue_status ist on i.issue_status_id = ist.issue_status_id left join setting_code sc on i.setting_code_id = sc.setting_code_id where i.project_id = #{projectId} and i.issue_id = #{issueId} for update

select count(*) from issue i join project p on i.project_id = p.project_id where i.project_id = #{projectId} and i.issue_id = #{issueId} and ( i.issue_status_id = #{toStatusId} or p.owner_id = #{userId} or exists ( select 1 from workflow_transition wt join project_member pm on wt.role_id = pm.role_id join team_member tm on pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id where pm.project_id = i.project_id and tm.user_id = #{userId} and wt.issue_type_id = i.issue_type_id and wt.from_status_id = i.issue_status_id and wt.to_status_id = #{toStatusId} and ( wt.apply_target_code = 'j001' or (wt.apply_target_code = 'j002' and i.author_id = #{userId}) or (wt.apply_target_code = 'j003' and i.assignee_id = #{userId}) ) ) )
mapper.update: update issue set issue_status_id = #{issueStatusId}, setting_code_id = #{settingCodeId}, assignee_id = #{assigneeId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, title = #{title}, description = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, start_date = #{startDate, jdbcType=DATE}, due_date = #{dueDate, jdbcType=DATE}, estimated_hours = nvl(#{estimatedHours, jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0), progress_rate = nvl(#{progressRate, jdbcType=INTEGER}, 0), updated_at = sysdate, milestone_id = #{milestoneId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_issue_id = #{parentIssueId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where project_id = #{projectId} and issue_id = #{issueId}
